reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: In Agoda you mentioned room in photos large but it’s very small

reviews.title: Excess payment made due to your fault
reviews.positives: At the time of booking clearly mentioned about number of persons. Inspite of this your website booked contract to it. Very bad part on your part

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I booked a room where it mentioned full refund but when I called for cancelling my booking due to change of plans caused due to the indigo flights fiasco, I was told no money can be refunded. I lost my entire money approx *** on account of this. I do not recommend any of these places that cannot honour their words.

reviews.title: Horrible front desk executives, the rest is okay.
reviews.positives: The rooms were clean and comfortable. The location is nice.
reviews.negatives: Front desk staff is rude, and tried to force you to make additional payment.

reviews.title: Don't get confused with the online photos.
reviews.text: Though a new property, but very small rooms. There restaurant is not fully functional. I didn't enjoy my stay at all. Rating 2 / 5

reviews.title: Not ideal for families
reviews.negatives:
Super basic, cramped room. 
With not even a hook to hang towels in the bathroom. So as basic as it gets. 
Ideal for business travel but not for families. 
Charged us for an extra bed in the room, but honestly there was barely any space in the room for it and the bed never arrived to begin with

reviews.title: Faculties could be improved
reviews.text: Didn't get hot water, even after complaining nothing changed

reviews.title: I came for a short day and still it fulfilled my expectations
Ok ok
reviews.text: Just ok we stayed for one night and was just ok . Shower flow was very slow that I had to shower for an hr . Location wise good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The property's proximity to Bagmane Tech Park is a major advantage. The convenient location significantly reduces commute time, Ideal for IT professionals working in the area.

The property is relatively new and well-maintained with clean rooms. Would definitely recommend!"
reviews.negatives: Rooms lacked proper ventilation with no balconies or opening windows, and views were obstructed by an adjacent building.

reviews.title: Economic stay
reviews.text:
We had complained on the foul smell from the washroom and had a room changed as well, but the foul smell continued in the other room as well. 
It would start the moment flush is used, so it's a problem in the draining system I guess.  Not sure about it. 


The property is best suited for a single person. For a couple the deluxe room doesn't suffice.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: All the facilities available are the best in the class

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.positives: Spacious room and good breakfast options

reviews.title: It was okay not so great for the money
reviews.text: The hotel is new and clean but the rooms are small and not many drawers or spacious bathroom for the price and they were not able to accomodate early check in and charge. 40% extra which is very expensive. It can suffice for a day but not comfortable for long stay

reviews.title: Well maintained
reviews.text: Friendly staff, very clean and well maintained stay.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay with great staff
reviews.text: It was a good stay, they changed my room when complained about the smell and gave me a discounted upgrade since it was their issue, minor problems with shower switch but otherwise nothing else to complain about, very clean and great staff. So overall a good value for money

reviews.title: Good stay in prime location
reviews.text:
It was a good stay in prime location. It's a new property so rooms are neat and clean.
Location is the key point for this hotel.

reviews.title: One day stay
reviews.text: Good stay. Location might be little walkable from bus stop. Facilities were good. Room size was little but fine for a single traveller

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Had a nice stay in TGI Livancia.  Service was good and cordial. Would definitely recommend this hotel to others

reviews.title: TGI livancia
reviews.text: The stay was very good. Clean and good looking room with all amneties. Fresh toilet. Good breakfast. Convenient location too. Recommended

reviews.title: Excellent place to stay near Google, Samsung, BWT center offices
reviews.text: Neatly maintained. Value for money (especially if you book via agoda) good breakfast..

reviews.title: Great Stay with Minor Issues
reviews.text: The location is top-notch, making it easy to explore nearby attractions, while cleanliness throughout the property is impressive. Facilities are excellent, particularly the well-maintained amenities that enhance the overall experience. However, the staff could be more attentive and friendly, which slightly detracted from the stay. On the bright side, sleep quality was great, and transport options were convenient, ensuring a smooth visit.

reviews.title: A good budget hotel
reviews.text: Had a pleasant stay. The cleanliness they exhibit is worth mentioning especially the housekeeping department. Overall it’s worth your money

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: This place is almost new and really well maintained. It's inside a silent street and close to many companies. The food is decent. Staff are courteous and will assist you with a smile.

reviews.title: Value For money
reviews.text: Very comfortable and clean place , verygood service from staffs as well.

reviews.title: Amazing hospitality
reviews.text: I stayed for a day only, it’s amazing actually in term of service & cleanliness

reviews.title: Great Hospitality
reviews.text: Hotel has a great location and staff is very hospitable. Housekeeping & cleanliness is really good. Food needs some improvement with AC in dining area is recommended. Rest it's worth the value. Deserves 5 stars.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Best hotel near bagmane constellation park

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.text:
Room was clean and tidy. 
The one thing I felt bad is there is no seperate closet to keep the belonging and lock it. But apart from that it was a great stay.

reviews.title: Great one for short business stay.
reviews.text: Proximity to Bhagmane park .

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: Good place to stay, nice staff near to krpuram station

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Exceptional place to stay, nice property near to KR puram station

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Very nice stay, clean and professional

reviews.title: Very nice to stay
reviews.text: Every think is ok.  After the metro train  stats to run this area will be convenient  to all for stay and transport.

reviews.title: Hotel Value for Money
reviews.text: The staffs were extremely helpful, specially the guard lob was very helpful. The hotel was extremely clean and value for the money. Would definitely visit again

reviews.title: Best located property
reviews.text: Loved the stay, room is adequate and offers good comfort and cleanliness.

reviews.title: Amazing property
reviews.text: The hotel was very clean. Staff was helpful. Facilities were good. Breakfast was amazing. Recommended. Suitable for 2 persons only.

reviews.title: Amazing stay
reviews.text: Very clean, beautiful and well maintained. Staff was also very helpful.

reviews.title: Exceptionally Clean and Comfortable Stay
reviews.text: I had a very pleasant stay at TGI Livancia The Sojourn. The room and bathroom were exceptionally clean and well-maintained, which really stood out. The food served was good, and the staff were courteous and welcoming. Check-in and checkout were smooth and hassle-free. Located in a prime area close to IT offices, the stay was extremely convenient and comfortable. I would definitely choose to stay here again in the future.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 回訪兩次 都住得很舒服
